stemHtml: On an aircraft with two main generators, if one generator fails...

options.a: the components fed by that busbar will lose power and become unusable.
options.b: the busbar will be switched to another busbar.
options.c: the busbar is switched to an alternate power source so that its electrical components will be supplied with power.
options.d: the busbar is isolated completely, but its output components are switched to another busbar.
